# SimpleHome.ca

> Toronto's premier pre-construction and resale real estate platform

SimpleHome.ca is an informational platform covering pre-construction condos and new developments across the Greater Toronto Area (GTA). We are not a licensed real estate brokerage.

## What We Offer
- Comprehensive database of 200+ pre-construction projects in Toronto and the GTA
- Neighborhood guides covering 30+ areas across the Greater Toronto Area
- Developer profiles for Toronto's top builders
- Market analysis, buying guides, and blog content
- AI-powered assistant for finding pre-construction condos
- Connection to licensed Ontario real estate professionals (RECO registered)

## Key Pages
- /pre-construction - Browse all pre-construction projects with filters
- /areas/[neighborhood] - Neighborhood-specific project listings and guides
- /developers - Toronto's pre-construction developers
- /blog - Market insights, guides, and analysis
- /portfolio - Notable for-sale and sold properties
- /resale - Resale listings across the GTA

## Coverage Area
Toronto, Downtown Core, King West, Liberty Village, Queen West, Yorkville, Midtown, North York, Scarborough, Etobicoke, Mississauga, Vaughan, Richmond Hill, Markham, Oakville, Hamilton, and 30+ more neighborhoods.

## Contact
- Website: https://simplehome.ca
- Email: hello@simplehome.ca

## Disclaimer
SimpleHome.ca is an informational platform. We are not a licensed real estate brokerage. All information is approximate and subject to change. Consult licensed professionals for real estate decisions.
